senses.gloss: a forehead; the hair near person's forehead, forelock

examples.text: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًا بِالنَّاصِيَةِ
examples.english: But no! If he does not desist, We will certainly drag him by the forelock.

senses.gloss: mastery, control; expertise (in phrases like اِمْتِلَاك نَاصِيَة (imtilāk nāṣiya))
